```
The name of the file: src/dawn/native/d3d12/UtilsD3D12.cpp
Insertions: 1, Deletions: 1.

@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@
     // D3D12 requires unnecessary buffer storage for the image padding row
     // (rowsPerImage - copySizeInBlocks.height) on the last image. It does respect
     // row padding (bytesPerRow) and doesn't require storage for it on the last row.
-    // See b/41479503 for a more details.
+    // See crbug.com/41479503 for a more details.
 
     uint64_t bytesPerImage = Safe32x32(bytesPerRow, rowsPerImage);
     Extent3D copySizeInBlocks{copySize.width / blockInfo.width, copySize.height / blockInfo.height,
```

subject: [dawn] Enable module constant hoisting transform for apple silicon
text:
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as 9cf1e48631ae75751a8b8dcfe35fed8b1a8c04c2

7 is the latest approved patch-set.
The change was submitted with unreviewed changes in the following files:

```
The name of the file: src/dawn/native/metal/ShaderModuleMTL.mm
Insertions: 2, Deletions: 1.

@@ -298,7 +298,8 @@
     req.tintOptions.bindings = std::move(bindings);
     req.tintOptions.disable_polyfill_integer_div_mod =
         device->IsToggleEnabled(Toggle::DisablePolyfillsOnIntegerDivisonAndModulo);
-    req.tintOptions.enable_module_constant = device->IsToggleEnabled(Toggle::EnableModuleConstant);
+    req.tintOptions.enable_module_constant =
+        device->IsToggleEnabled(Toggle::MetalEnableModuleConstant);
     req.tintOptions.vertex_pulling_config = std::move(vertexPullingTransformConfig);
     req.tintOptions.enable_integer_range_analysis =
         device->IsToggleEnabled(Toggle::EnableIntegerRangeAnalysisInRobustness);
```
```
The name of the file: src/dawn/native/Toggles.h
Insertions: 1, Deletions: 1.

@@ -138,7 +138,7 @@
     ExposeWGSLTestingFeatures,
     ExposeWGSLExperimentalFeatures,
     DisablePolyfillsOnIntegerDivisonAndModulo,
-    EnableModuleConstant,
+    MetalEnableModuleConstant,
     EnableImmediateErrorHandling,
     VulkanUseStorageInputOutput16,
     D3D12DontUseShaderModel66OrHigher,
```
```
The name of the file: src/dawn/native/metal/PhysicalDeviceMTL.mm
Insertions: 1, Deletions: 1.

@@ -446,7 +446,7 @@
     // there are execution correction issues with f16 for non apple silicon (Intel/AMD). Therefore
     // we only enable for apple silicon for now.
     if (gpu_info::IsApple(vendorId)) {
-        deviceToggles->Default(Toggle::EnableModuleConstant, true);
+        deviceToggles->Default(Toggle::MetalEnableModuleConstant, true);
     }
 
     // On some Intel GPUs vertex only render pipeline get wrong depth result if no fragment
```
```
The name of the file: src/dawn/native/Toggles.cpp
Insertions: 2, Deletions: 2.

@@ -570,8 +570,8 @@
      {"disable_polyfills_on_integer_div_and_mod",
       "Disable the Tint polyfills on integer division and modulo.", "https://crbug.com/tint/2128",
       ToggleStage::Device}},
-    {Toggle::EnableModuleConstant,
-     {"enable_module_constant_transform", "Enable the module constant transform.",
+    {Toggle::MetalEnableModuleConstant,
+     {"metal_enable_module_constant_transform", "Enable the module constant transform.",
       "https://crbug.com/419804339", ToggleStage::Device}},
     {Toggle::EnableImmediateErrorHandling,
      {"enable_immediate_error_handling",
```
